LanguageData.Animal_Doberman.label: doberman
LanguageData.Animal_Doberman.description: Genetically engineered pet for domestic and military needs. At home, the doberman guards the household against any potential intruders, for instance in the urbworld environment of the doberman federation, the presence of dobermans were very common in order to ward off thieves or providing enough time till the owner can grab their gun and execute the thieves.\n\nIn the military, dobermans were used as attack dogs. Mostly seen in the battlefield rushing through enemy trenches and ripping off the enemy's throat all while clad in either kevlar vests or a personal suit of protect gear armor.
LanguageData.Animal_Doberman.tools.li.label: left claw
